patterns.name: Missing Branch Type Prefix
patterns.template: Branch name should start with a type prefix: feature/, fix/, release/, hotfix/, chore/, docs/, etc.

patterns.name: Uppercase Characters in Branch Name
patterns.template: Use lowercase kebab-case for branch names: `{name}` → `{nameLower}`

patterns.name: Invalid Characters in Branch Name
patterns.template: Branch name contains invalid characters. Use only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, forward slashes, and dots.

patterns.name: Nested Slash in Branch Name
patterns.template: Avoid nested slashes in branch names. Use a single slash after the type prefix: `type/description`

patterns.name: Branch Name Too Long
patterns.template: Branch name exceeds 60 characters ({length}). Keep branch names concise (3-5 word description).

patterns.name: Missing Ticket Reference
patterns.template: Consider including a ticket/issue number in the branch name for traceability.

patterns.name: Trailing Slash
patterns.template: Branch name must not end with a slash.

patterns.name: Consecutive Hyphens
patterns.template: Replace consecutive hyphens with a single hyphen.
